body:
## What

Adds a bilingual (AR + EN) operating bundle under `docs/acquisition_packs/` that turns Dealix from an idea/platform into a daily opportunity machine: source → score → identify gap → human-approved draft → meeting → proof.

10 numbered packs + a top-level index:

| # | Pack |
|---|---|
| 00 | `README.md` — index |
| 01 | Client Understanding Pack |
| 02 | Daily Company Numbers Engine |
| 03 | Offer Packages (6 named offers) |
| 04 | Marketer Field Manual |
| 05 | Outreach Scripts (drafts) |
| 06 | Client Explanation Pack |
| 07 | Daily Operating Cadence |
| 08 | Repo Automation Spec |
| 09 | Dashboards — 3 CSV templates + README |
| 10 | Compliance Pack (Saudi PDPL) |

CSV templates: `daily_numbers_template.csv`, `company_scoring_template.csv`, `pipeline_template.csv` — with a `consent_basis` column for PDPL traceability and a `new → qualified → contacted → replied → meeting → proposal → won/lost` status path.

## Doctrine compliance

Every file honors the non-negotiables:
- **No scraping / no purchased lists** — sourcing limited to public registries, public announcements, and founder-supplied market signals (`source_registry` / `forbidden_sources`).
- **No cold/bulk/automated outreach** — all messages are human-approved drafts routed through `approval_center` under `NO_LIVE_SEND`; opt-out line + consent basis in every template.
- **No guaranteed outcomes** — figures framed as estimates / case-safe patterns; every doc ends with `القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة / Estimated value is not Verified value`.
- **No PII** — examples use `Example Trading Co` with `legitimate_interest_b2b`.
- Prices anchored to the source of truth `docs/commercial/DEALIX_REVOPS_PACKAGES_AR.md` (ranges illustrative).

## Notes

- Pure docs/CSV change — no code, no schema, no API changes.
- The Repo Automation Spec (`08`) is a design spec describing proposed paths/endpoints/fields/GitHub Action; it does not add code.

## Verification

- All 11 `.md` files: bilingual `Title — العنوان` H1, parallel AR/EN sections, closing disclaimer present.
- Forbidden-term scan: every occurrence sits inside a prohibition ("no scraping", "no bulk send", etc.).
- README index links all 10 packs + the 3 CSVs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_017resTsYcKtLZ7ZNUZ5TBqc

---

commits.messageBody:
Bilingual (AR+EN) operating bundle under docs/acquisition_packs/:
daily company numbers engine, client understanding, offer packages,
marketer field manual, outreach drafts, client explanation, daily
operating cadence, repo automation spec, dashboard CSV templates, and
a Saudi PDPL compliance pack — plus a top-level index.

Honors the non-negotiables throughout: no scraping / no purchased
lists (allowed public + founder market signals only), no cold/bulk/
automated outreach (human-approved drafts via approval_center,
NO_LIVE_SEND), no guaranteed outcomes (estimated-value disclaimer on
every doc), and PDPL consent_basis recorded in the CSV schemas.
